docs.title: MEDHIRA React TypeScript Hooks
docs.text:
Engineering Intelligence Across Everything

Custom React hooks for faster development.

docs.title: Quick Example
docs.text:
import { useDefaultReducer } from 'medhira-react-typescript-hooks';

const { state, multipleAction } = useDefaultReducer({ count: 0 });

docs.title: Contributing
docs.text:
Contributions welcome!

  1. Fork the repo
  2. Create a branch
  3. Submit a PR

Setup:

npm install
npm test

Contact: hello.medhira@gmail.com

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
npm install medhira-react-typescript-hooks
# or
yarn add medhira-react-typescript-hooks

Peer dependency:

npm install react@>=18

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
import { useDefaultReducer } from 'medhira-react-typescript-hooks';

const initialState = { name: '', email: '' };

function MyComponent() {
  const { state, multipleAction } = useDefaultReducer(initialState);

  return (
    <input
      value={state.name}
      onChange={(e) => multipleAction({ name: e.target.value })}
    />
  );
}

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description initialState object Yes Initial state object

docs.title: Returns
docs.text: Return Type Description state object Current state multipleAction function Update state

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
const { state, multipleAction } = useDefaultReducer({
  email: '',
  password: ''
});

multipleAction({ email: 'test@example.com' });
